rationale: The conservative prose failsafe (extract_json_safely) uses first-trigger-wins and on 3 cases captured a weaker finding phrase over a diagnosis the model NAMED elsewhere in the same response. These overrides recover the diagnosis from the model's OWN text; they do not add information. The RadLE prompt and image payload were unchanged; no re-inference was done. Trigger-priority tuning against the 200-case eval set was deliberately avoided (would fit the extractor to the test data).

overrides.from: these tumors in both optic nerves
overrides.model_quote: The image shows a case of bilateral optic nerve gliomas. The axial T1-weighted MRI with contrast demonstrates the presence of these tumors in both optic nerves.
It shows a large mass in the right lower quadrant, which is likely an ovarian tumor.

overrides.from: multiple cavitary lesions in the lungs
overrides.model_quote: The image shows a case of pulmonary tuberculosis... The CT scan reveals multiple cavitary lesions in the lungs, which are characteristic findings in patients with pulmonary tuberculosis.
